Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to group events into cases patient journeys There is no case ID so we need to infer based on patient attributes age gender and logical flow Also department and resource can help

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Let me list events with patient attributes

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1 age 45 M ER Register patient 2 age 62 F ER Register patient 3 age 28 M Surgery Register patient 4 age 45 M ER Initial triage 5 age 62 F ER Initial triage 6 age 28 M Surgery Doctor consultation Dr Lee 7 age 45 M Radiology X ray imaging 8 age 62 F ER Lab test requested 9 age 28 M Surgery Surgery preparation 10 age 62 F Laboratory Lab test completed 11 age 62 F ER Doctor consultation Dr Smith 12 age 45 M ER Doctor consultation Dr Lee 13 age 28 M Surgery Surgery performed 14 age 62 F ER Prescription created 15 age 45 M ER Patient discharged 16 age 28 M Surgery Recovery room 17 age 62 F ER Patient discharged 18 age 28 M Surgery Patient discharged

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we have three distinct patient profiles Patient A 45 year old male ER journey Patient B 62 year old female ER journey Patient C 28 year old male Surgery journey

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Patient A 45M ER 1 Register patient 08 05 13 4 Initial triage 08 10 50 nurse Joy 7 X ray imaging 08 15 42 Radiology 12 Doctor consultation 08 23 10 Dr Lee diagnosis hairline fracture 15 Patient discharged 08 30 05 followup outpatient clinic

Name: Validation - PE
Text: That seems a logical ER flow register triage imaging consult discharge

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Patient B 62F ER 2 Register patient 08 07 02 5 Initial triage 08 12 29 nurse Mark triage code 2 8 Lab test requested 08 16 10 Dr Smith 10 Lab test completed 08 20 27 11 Doctor consultation 08 22 54 Dr Smith diagnosis minor infection 14 Prescription created 08 27 00 medication antibiotics 17 Patient discharged 08 35 29 followup pharmacy pickup

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Logical flow register triage lab test consult prescription discharge

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Patient C 28M Surgery 3 Register patient 08 07 15 Surgery 6 Doctor consultation 08 13 00 Dr Lee reason scheduled knee surgery 9 Surgery preparation 08 16 45 general anesthesia 13 Surgery performed 08 25 19 arthroscopy 16 Recovery room 08 31 37 stable 18 Patient discharged 08 40 13 followup physiotherapy sessions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Logical flow register consult prep surgery recovery discharge

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we can group them into three cases Case 1 45M ER Case 2 62F ER Case 3 28M Surgery The case ID can be something like Case 001 Case 002 Case 003 or based on patient ID Since there is no explicit case ID we can assign based on the first registration event

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus Case A 45M Events 1 4 7 12 15 Case B 62F Events 2 5 8 10 11 14 17 Case C 28M Events 3 6 9 13 16 18

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We should also note that the grouping is based on patient age and gender and logical sequence of activities

Name: Validation - IND
Text: We might also check if any other attributes could cause confusion For example Dr Lee appears in both Case A and Case C Doctor consultation for 45M in ER and Doctor consultation for 28M in Surgery and also Surgery performed Thats fine

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Resource Ward Clerk appears in both ER and Surgery discharges
